arts.ttl: West Ham sign Brighton striker Ferguson on loan
arts.sum: “I can see and know how big West Ham United is," he told the club's official website . West Ham United have signed Brighton & Hove Albion forward Evan Ferguson on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Joao Felix to undergo medical as Chelsea departure agreed
arts.sum: Joao Felix prepares to leave Chelsea on loan after making just 12 appearances in the Premier League following a big-money move from Atletico Madrid.

arts.ttl: Chelsea working on six deals on transfer deadline day as Alejandro Garnacho question remains
arts.sum: Chelsea are still working to get a load of deals done on transfer deadline day with time running out for the Blues to make a last minute signing. The Blues and the Black and Yellow agreed a loan deal for the 21-year-old midfielder on Sunday evening and he is currently finalising a move to Signal Iduna Park, football.london understands.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Chelsea receive Joao Felix transfer offer as deadline day loan rules explained
arts.sum: "The problem, unfortunately, for Joao and Christo, the manager plays most of the games with one attacking midfielder and that is Cole Palmer," Maresca said last month when asked about Felix's lack of minutes this season . "We have decided to play with an attacking midfielder in most of the games, so this is the reason why Joao and Christo struggle to get minutes - not for any different reasons because they are both fantastic players, fantastic guys who work well.

arts.sum: West Ham make the short trip to Chelsea this evening as Graham Potter faces his former team for the first time. Potter has made a solid start since replacing Julen Lopetegui at the London Stadium and will now look to upset his old employers. Last weekend, Emerson Palmieri’s goal earned a point at Aston Villa. arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Joao Felix on brink of exit after 'verbal agreement reached'
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly reach an agreement with a Champions League-participating club over a loan exit for Joao Felix.
